inputs.prompt: Make the existing Showcase region easier to understand for a first-time player

lines: Welcome to the Mesh Engine Showcase Region!
This area is designed to demonstrate the engine's capabilities.
To the north is the Interior, where you can find a Merchant to prepare.
To the east lies the Dungeon. Beware, it contains a dangerous Boss and a hidden Artifact.

actions.description: Update Greeter dialogue to explain the region layout.

lines: Welcome! You look like you're heading for the dungeon.
You should stock up on potions before you go.
I've heard there's a 'Fetch the Artifact' job (showcase_fetch) available.
And if you're brave enough, the 'Defeat the Boss' bounty (showcase_kill) pays well.

actions.description: Update Merchant dialogue to hint at quests and preparation.

lines: There's a massive Boss deeper in this dungeon.
I've been stuck here trying to figure out this door.
I think there's a switch hidden somewhere nearby that opens it.

actions.description: Update Lost Explorer dialogue to hint at the puzzle and boss.
